source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 2 orgs with matching specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline searches PubMed/CTgov/web — may find orgs not in AminoChain (e.g. ITMIG network institutions, Mayo Clinic thoracic surgery biobank). Those are valid, not errors. TCGA-THYM is a valid academic find but provides genomics data, not physical specimens — must not be scored as a specimen source.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

ProteoGenex.notes: Only org with FFPE tissue; no WHO histotype annotation; serum not plasma

BIOMEDICA CRO.notes: Plasma only; no tissue; TNM staged but Masaoka-Koga unconfirmed

CSD Bio.notes: Buffy coat not plasma; does not satisfy matched plasma requirement

Medical Gate.notes: Contact is aminochain placeholder; whole blood not plasma

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: not annotated in any AminoChain source — requires pathology re-review; critical for query requirement
TNM and Masaoka-Koga are not equivalent staging systems — pipeline must not conflate them
no confirmed matched pairs in AminoChain data despite both specimen types existing across orgs
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

staging_system_discrimination.check: pipeline must distinguish Masaoka-Koga from TNM and flag the gap explicitly
staging_system_discrimination.pass: Masaoka-Koga vs TNM conflation is flagged as [not_stated] or [open_question]
staging_system_discrimination.fail: pipeline asserts TNM stage satisfies Masaoka-Koga requirement without flagging the distinction

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs
ground_truth_overlap.notes: Academic sources (ITMIG consortia institutions, Mayo, MD Anderson) are valid additional finds not covered by this ground truth

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
TCGA-THYM must not be listed as a physical specimen source

Masaoka-Koga_stage.status: not_indexed — TNM present but not equivalent
